#  Add Punch List Items to a Drawing 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add markups to the Personal layer,_ 'Read Only' or above on the project's Drawings tool.
    * _To publish personal markups to the Published layer_ , 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool. See [What is the difference between personal and published markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You cannot create a new punch list item using the drawing markup tool at app.procore.com. However, you can create punch list items from a drawing using the Procore app on your mobile device.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Open** next to the drawing you want to mark up.  
Note: You can also click **Info** next to the drawing, then click **Open in Viewer / Markup**.
  3. Click the **Markup** icon. See [Mark Up a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing).![Markup In The Drawing Toolbar](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/690eed7f1b889b05c32e8c1fa29218f8/97849b368c8d5070d7b9f4577cc64966/markup-in-the-drawing-toolbar.jpg?fm=webp&h=40)
  4. Click the **Pins** icon on the markup toolbar.  
_Note:_ If you do not see 'Pins'_,_ another pin markup option (such as Photos, Issue, or Observations) may already be selected. Clicking any one of the pin options will expand the options to show Punch.
  5. Select the **Punch** icon from the Markup toolbar.
  6. Click on the drawing where you want to place the punch list item.
  7. In the **Link a Punch Item** box, search for the punch list item you want to add.  
_**Tip!**_ Double-click in this field to bring up a list of all of the punch list items in the project that you have access to.
  8. Click the punch list item.
  9. The color of the punch item on the drawing will depend on the item's status. See [What do the punch item color codes on a drawing mean?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-do-the-punch-item-color-codes-on-a-drawing-mean):
     * BLUE: _Initiated Work_ or _Required._
     * YELLOW: _Review_ or _Ready to Close_.
     * RED: _In Dispute_ , _Work Not Accepted_ , or _Not Accepted_.
     * GRAY: _Draft_ or _Closed_.


##  Next Steps 
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups)

title: Add Punch List Items to a Drawing
description: How to link existing punch list items to drawings.
